parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
TENANT_SCHEMA="$ROOT/specs/tenant_runtime_state_schema.v1.json"
JOB_SCHEMA="$ROOT/specs/job_runtime_state_schema.v1.json"
missing=""
for f in "$TENANT_SCHEMA" "$JOB_SCHEMA"; do
  if [ ! -f "$f" ]; then
    if [ -n "$missing" ]; then missing="$missing, "; fi
    missing="$missing$f"
  fi
done
if [ -n "$missing" ]; then
  echo "{"status":"hard_failure","code":"missing_input_schemas","message":"Required schema files are missing","missing":"$missing"}"
  exit 1
fi
node -e "const fs=require('fs');JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8'));JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[2],'utf8'));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:'ok',tenant_schema:process.argv[1],job_schema:process.argv[2]}));" "$TENANT_SCHEMA" "$JOB_SCHEMA"

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const out = $node['Assert Shared Schemas'].json.stdout || '{}'; let parsed; try { parsed = JSON.parse(out); } catch (e) { parsed = { status: 'hard_failure', code: 'invalid_schema_files', message: out || 'schema parse failed' }; } return { status: 'hard_failure', reason: 'missing_or_invalid_schemas', code: parsed.code || 'invalid_schema_files', details: parsed }; })() }}

parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
ROOT="{{$env.PROJECT_ROOT || '/data/aries-platform-bootstrap'}}"
TENANT_ID="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.tenant_id}}"
JOB_TYPE="{{$node['Normalize Input'].json.job_type}}"
REQUEST_JSON='{{$node["Normalize Input"].json.request_json}}'
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
JOB_ID="mkt_prod_${TENANT_ID}_$(date +%s)"
OUT_DIR="$ROOT/generated/draft/marketing-production-jobs"
OUT_PATH="$OUT_DIR/${JOB_ID}.json"
mkdir -p "$OUT_DIR"
node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const p=process.argv;const now=p[1],jobId=p[2],tenantId=p[3],jobType=p[4],requestJson=p[5],outPath=p[6];const req=JSON.parse(requestJson||"{}");const strategy=req.strategy_outputs||req.strategy||{};const approval=(req.approval||{});const approvalRequired=approval.required!==false;const approved=approval.approved===true;const statusUpdates=[{at:now,state:"queued",status:"pending",step:"accepted",details:{note:"marketing production job accepted"}},{at:now,state:"running",status:"in_progress",step:"production_orchestration_started",details:{strategy_input_keys:Object.keys(strategy)}}];const branches={"ad-designer":{state:"completed",status:"ready",source:"strategy_outputs",summary:"Ad concepts prepared from strategy outputs."},"scriptwriter":{state:"completed",status:"ready",source:"strategy_outputs",summary:"Scripts drafted from strategy outputs."},"page-designer":{state:"completed",status:"ready",source:"strategy_outputs",summary:"Landing page drafts prepared from strategy outputs."}};statusUpdates.push({at:now,state:"production_parallelized",status:"completed",step:"parallel_production",details:{branches:["ad-designer","scriptwriter","page-designer"]}});if(approvalRequired&&!approved){statusUpdates.push({at:now,state:"awaiting_approval",status:"blocked",step:"approval_checkpoint",details:{required:true,approved:false}});}else{statusUpdates.push({at:now,state:"publishing",status:"ready",step:"approval_checkpoint",details:{required:approvalRequired,approved:true}});}const doc={schema_name:"job_runtime_state_schema",schema_version:"1.0.0",job_id:jobId,job_type:jobType,tenant_id:tenantId,state:approvalRequired&&!approved?"awaiting_approval":"publishing",status:approvalRequired&&!approved?"blocked":"in_progress",attempt:1,max_attempts:3,inputs:{request:req,strategy_outputs:strategy},production:{parallel_branches:branches},approval:{required:approvalRequired,approved},status_updates:statusUpdates,history:statusUpdates,created_at:now,updated_at:now};fs.writeFileSync(outPath,JSON.stringify(doc,null,2));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:"accepted",tenant_id:tenantId,job_type:jobType,job_id:jobId,job_state:doc.state,approval_required:approvalRequired&&!approved,published:false,repair_attempted:false,job_runtime_path:outPath,status_updates:statusUpdates}));' "$NOW" "$JOB_ID" "$TENANT_ID" "$JOB_TYPE" "$REQUEST_JSON" "$OUT_PATH"

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const base = JSON.parse($node['Create Production Job'].json.stdout); return { ...base, status: 'awaiting_approval', publish_blocked: true, next_action: 'submit approval.required=false or approval.approved=true to continue publishing' }; })() }}

parameters.command:
set -euo pipefail
CREATE_STDOUT='{{$node["Create Production Job"].json.stdout}}'
REQUEST_JSON='{{$node["Normalize Input"].json.request_json}}'
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
node -e 'const fs=require("fs");const base=JSON.parse(process.argv[1]);const req=JSON.parse(process.argv[2]||"{}");const now=process.argv[3];const path=base.job_runtime_path;const doc=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path,"utf8"));const maxAttempts=3;let repairAttempted=false;let published=true;let publishError=null;const shouldFail=!!req.simulate_publish_failure;doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"publishing",status:"in_progress",step:"publish_attempt_1",details:{attempt:1}});if(shouldFail){published=false;publishError="simulated_publish_failure";doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"publishing",status:"failed",step:"publish_attempt_1",details:{error:publishError}});}if(!published){const repair=((req.repair||{}).enabled)!==false;if(repair&&doc.attempt<maxAttempts){repairAttempted=true;doc.attempt=doc.attempt+1;doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"repair_running",status:"in_progress",step:"bounded_repair",details:{attempt:doc.attempt,max_attempts:maxAttempts,reason:publishError}});doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"publishing",status:"in_progress",step:"publish_attempt_2",details:{attempt:2}});published=true;doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"completed",status:"success",step:"publish_completed_after_repair",details:{repair_attempted:true}});}else{doc.state="failed";doc.status="failed";doc.status_updates.push({at:now,state:"failed",status:"failed",step:"publish_failed_no_repair",details:{reason:publishError}});}}if(published){doc.state="completed";doc.status="success";}doc.updated_at=now;doc.history=doc.status_updates;fs.writeFileSync(path,JSON.stringify(doc,null,2));process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({status:doc.state==="failed"?"failed":"completed",tenant_id:doc.tenant_id,job_type:doc.job_type,job_id:doc.job_id,job_state:doc.state,approval_required:false,published:published,repair_attempted:repairAttempted,job_runtime_path:path,status_updates:doc.status_updates}));' "$CREATE_STDOUT" "$REQUEST_JSON" "$NOW"
